---
title: "REDCap Variable List"
author: "Tianqi Ouyang"
date: last-modified
---

Complete variable list from the Terlipressin Database REDCap Code Book (PID: 43500). The database contains 18 instruments with 1500+ fields. Treatment day instruments (Day 0--13) share identical structure; they are documented once below.

## Demographics {#demographics}

| # | Variable | Label | Type | Values / Unit |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------------|
| 1 | `subjectid` | Subject ID | text | e.g. BCM-001 |
| 7 | `date_birth` | Date of birth | date | Required |
| 8 | `age` | Age | calc | `rounddown(datediff(date_birth, admit_date, "y"))` |
| 9 | `sex_male` | Sex | radio | 1 = Male, 0 = Female |
| 10 | `race` | Race | radio | 1 = White, 2 = Black, 3 = Asian, 4 = Other |
| 11 | `hispanic` | Hispanic | radio | 1 = Hispanic or Latino, 0 = Not Hispanic or Latino |
| 12 | `insurance_type` | Type of insurance | radio | 1 = Medicare, 2 = Medicaid, 3 = Private, 4 = Self pay, 5 = Other |
| 14 | `cirrhosis_etiology` | Cirrhosis etiology | radio | 1 = Alcohol, 2 = MASH (NASH), 3 = HCV, 4 = HCV+Alcohol, 5 = MetALD, 6 = Other |
| 16 | `etoh_hepatitis` | Alcohol-associated hepatitis | yesno | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 4 | `admit_date` | Admit date | date | Required |
| 5 | `admit_admitservice` | Admitting service | radio | 1 = Medicine, 2 = ICU, 3 = Primary Liver Service, 4 = Surgical, 5 = Other |
| 6 | `admit_admitroute` | Location admitted from | radio | 1 = ER, 2 = Transfer, 3 = Direct admission |
| 17 | `admit_reason` | Reason(s) for admission | checkbox | 1 = Overt HE, 2 = Portal HTN bleed, 3 = Ascites/Anasarca, 4 = Infection, 5 = AKI, 6 = Other, 7 = Liver-unrelated |

## Medical History {#medical-history}

### Comorbidities

| # | Variable | Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------|
| 20 | `htn_medical_hx` | Hypertension | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 21 | `dm_medical_hx` | Diabetes | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 22 | `ckd_medical_hx` | Chronic kidney disease | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 23 | `cad_medical_hx` | Coronary artery disease | yesno | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |

### Pre-Admission Medications

| # | Variable | Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------|
| 24 | `nsbb_preadmission` | NSBB | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 25 | `nsbb_type_preadmission` | NSBB type | radio | 1 = Propranolol, 2 = Carvedilol, 3 = Nadolol, 4 = Other |
| 26 | `nsbb_dose_preadmission` | NSBB total daily dose (mg) | number | 0--160 |
| 27 | `ace_arb_preadmission` | ACEi/ARB | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 28 | `nsaid_preadmission` | NSAID | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 29 | `diuretics_preadmission` | Loop diuretic | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 31 | `sbp_ppx_preadmission` | SBP prophylaxis | radio | 0 = None, 1 = Ciprofloxacin, 2 = Sulfamethoxazole/TMP, 3 = Other |
| 32 | `lactulose_preadmission` | Lactulose | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 33 | `rifaximin_preadmission` | Rifaximin | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 34 | `mido_preadmission` | Midodrine | yesno | 1 = Yes, 0 = No |
| 35 | `mido_dose_preadmission` | Midodrine daily dose (mg) | text | |

### Previous Cirrhosis Complications

| # | Variable | Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------|
| 36 | `ascites_previous_comp` | Ascites | yesno | 1/0 |
| 37 | `refascites_previous_comp` | Refractory ascites | yesno | 1/0 |
| 38 | `he_previous_comp` | Hepatic encephalopathy | yesno | 1/0 |
| 39 | `sbp_previous_comp` | SBP | yesno | 1/0 |
| 40 | `nonsbp_previous_comp` | Non-SBP infections (90d) | yesno | 1/0 |
| 41 | `phtn_bleed_previous_comp` | Portal HTN bleed | yesno | 1/0 |
| 42 | `hcc_previous_comp` | HCC | yesno | 1/0 |
| 43 | `tips_previous_comp` | TIPS | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |

### Baseline Creatinine

| # | Variable | Label | Type | Values / Unit |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------------|
| 44 | `baseline_scr` | Baseline SCr | number | mg/dL, 0.2--10; within 3 months pre-admission |
| 46 | `baseline_scr_days_to_admit` | Days from baseline SCr to admit | calc | |
| 47 | `baseline_scr_outpt` | Baseline is outpatient? | yesno | 1/0 |
| 48 | `baseline_scr_120to365` | Outpatient SCr 120--365d available? | yesno | 1/0 |
| 49 | `baseline_scr_120to365_value` | Outpatient SCr 120--365d value | text | mg/dL |
| 50 | `aki_previous_90days` | AKI within 90 days? | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 51 | `aki_events_previous90days` | Number of AKI events prior 90d | text | |

## Labs within 72 Hours of Admission {#admit-labs}

| # | Variable | Label | Unit | Type |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|:-----|
| 58 | `scr_admit` | Serum creatinine | mg/dL | number |
| 60 | `cystatinc_admit` | Cystatin C | mg/L | number |
| 62 | `tbili_admit` | Total bilirubin | mg/dL | number |
| 64 | `inr_admit` | INR | -- | number |
| 66 | `sodium_admit` | Serum sodium | mmol/L | number |
| 68 | `albumin_admit` | Albumin | g/dL | number |
| 70 | `lactate_admit` | Lactate | mmol/L | number |
| 71 | `hegrade_admit` | HE grade at admission | -- | radio: 0 = None, 1--4 = Grade 1--4 |
| 72 | `admit_ascites` | Ascites severity | -- | radio: 1 = Absent, 2 = Slight/Moderate, 3 = Large/Tense |

## AKI Details {#aki-details}

### Diagnosis

| # | Variable | Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------|
| 74 | `aki_date` | Date AKI criteria met | date | Required |
| 75 | `days_admit_to_aki` | Days admission to AKI | calc | |
| 76 | `aki_precipitant` | Precipitant | checkbox | 1 = Volume loss, 2 = SBP, 3 = Non-SBP infection, 4 = GI bleed, 5 = Nephrotoxic drugs, 6 = Other, 7 = No identifiable |
| 77 | `aki_precipitant_nsbpinf` | Non-SBP infection type | radio | 1 = Pneumonia, 2 = UTI, 3 = Bacteremia, 4 = Other |
| 52 | `transfer_aki` | Transferred with AKI | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 54 | `transfer_aki_days_toadmit` | Days transfer to admission | calc | |

### Vitals at AKI

| # | Variable | Label | Unit |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|
| 80 | `aki_weight` | Body weight | kg |
| 81 | `aki_height` | Height | cm |
| 82 | `aki_hr` | Heart rate | BPM |
| 83 | `aki_sbp` | Systolic BP | mmHg |
| 84 | `aki_dbp` | Diastolic BP | mmHg |
| 85 | `aki_map` | MAP | mmHg (calc) |
| 86 | `aki_spo2` | SpO2 | % |
| 87 | `aki_pao2` | PaO2 | mmHg |
| 88 | `fio2_aki` | FiO2 | % |

### Labs at AKI

| # | Variable | Label | Unit |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|
| 91 | `sodium_aki` | Serum sodium | mmol/L |
| 93 | `potassium_aki` | Serum potassium | mmol/L |
| 95 | `scr_aki` | Serum creatinine | mg/dL |
| 97 | `cystatinc_aki` | Cystatin C | mg/L |
| 99 | `bun_aki` | BUN | mg/dL |
| 101 | `tbili_aki` | Total bilirubin | mg/dL |
| 103 | `albumin_aki` | Albumin | g/dL |
| 105 | `inr_aki` | INR | -- |
| 107 | `wbc_aki` | WBC | 10^9/L |
| 109 | `plt_aki` | Platelet count | 10^9/L |

### Prognosis Scores at AKI

| # | Variable | Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------|
| 110 | `he_aki` | HE grade on day of AKI | radio | 0 = None, 1--4 = Grade 1--4 |
| 111 | `ascites_aki` | Ascites on day of AKI | radio | 1 = Absent, 2 = Slight/Moderate, 3 = Large/Tense |
| 112 | `rrt_aki` | RRT on day of AKI | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 113 | `mv_aki` | Intubated on day of AKI | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |
| 116 | `pressors_aki` | Vasopressors on day of AKI | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes |

## Cardio-Pulmonary History {#cardiopulmonary}

| # | Variable | Label | Type | Values / Unit |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------------|
| 118 | `chest_imaging` | Chest imaging pre-terli | yesno | 1/0 |
| 119 | `chest_imaging_pulmedema` | Pulmonary edema | yesno | 1/0 |
| 120 | `chest_imaging_effusion` | Pleural effusion | yesno | 1/0 |
| 121 | `ecg` | ECG obtained | yesno | 1/0 |
| 124 | `ecg_qtc` | Corrected QTc | number | |
| 125 | `echo` | Echo within 1 year | yesno | 1/0 |
| 127 | `days_to_echo` | Days admission to echo | calc | |
| 129 | `echo_ef` | LV ejection fraction | number | % |
| 131 | `echo_lateral_e` | Lateral e' velocity | number | cm/sec |
| 133 | `echo_trpeak` | Peak TR velocity | number | cm/sec |
| 135 | `echo_gls` | Global longitudinal strain | number | % |
| 137 | `echo_earatio` | Mitral E/A ratio | number | |
| 139 | `echo_eeratio` | E/e' ratio | number | |
| 141 | `echo_rvsp` | RV systolic pressure | number | mmHg |
| 143 | `echo_pasp` | PA systolic pressure | number | mmHg |
| 145 | `echo_lavi` | Left atrial volume index | number | mL/m2 |
| 147 | `echo_tr` | TR velocity | number | m/sec |

## HRS Diagnosis Details {#hrs-diagnosis}

| # | Variable | Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------|
| 149 | `hrs_aki_criteria` | ICA HRS-AKI criteria | checkbox | 1 = Cirrhosis + ascites, 2 = AKI per ICA, 3 = No response 2d diuretic withdrawal + albumin, 4 = Absence of shock, 5 = No nephrotoxics, 6 = No proteinuria >500, 7 = No microhematuria, 8 = Normal kidney US |
| 150 | `albumin_before_terli` | Albumin given pre-terli | yesno | 1/0 |
| 151 | `totalalbumin_before_terli` | Total albumin pre-terli (g) | number | |
| 152 | `albvolume_before_terli` | Albumin volume pre-terli (mL) | number | |
| 153 | `crystalloid_before_terli` | Crystalloids given | radio | 0/1 |
| 155 | `saline_vol_before_terli` | Normal saline vol (mL) | number | |
| 156 | `lr_volume_before_terli` | Lactated ringers vol (mL) | number | |
| 158 | `prbc_trans_before_terli` | PRBC transfusion | radio | 0/1 |
| 159 | `prbc_qaunt_before_terli` | PRBC units | number | |
| 160 | `totalvolume_before_terli` | Total volume input (mL) | text | |
| 161 | `total_uo_before_terli` | Total urine output (mL) | text | |
| 162 | `nsbb_before_terli` | NSBB use pre-terli | radio | 1 = Withdrawn, 2 = Tapered, 3 = Continued, 4 = N/A |
| 164 | `mido_before_terli` | Midodrine pre-terli | yesno | 1/0 |
| 169 | `mido_maxdose_before_terli` | Max midodrine dose/day (mg) | text | |
| 170 | `oct_before_terli` | Octreotide pre-terli | yesno | 1/0 |
| 175 | `oct_maxdose_before_terli` | Max octreotide dose/day (mcg) | text | |
| 176 | `ne_before_terli` | Norepinephrine pre-terli | yesno | 1/0 |
| 182 | `gihep_consult` | GI/Hep consultation | yesno | 1/0 |
| 185 | `neph_consult` | Nephrology consultation | yesno | 1/0 |
| 188 | `pall_consult` | Palliative care consultation | yesno | 1/0 |
| 191 | `code_status` | Code status | radio | 1 = Full code, 2 = DNR |

## Urinary Indices {#urinary-indices}

| # | Variable | Label | Unit |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|
| 192 | `ua_hrs` | Urine analysis available | radio: 0/1 |
| 195 | `ua_na_hrs` | Urine sodium available | yesno |
| 198 | `ua_na_value_hrs` | Urine sodium | mmol/L |
| 199 | `sna_value_day_of_ua_na_hrs` | Serum sodium on day of urine Na | mmol/L |
| 200 | `ua_cr_hrs` | Urine creatinine available | yesno |
| 203 | `ua_cr_value_hrs` | Urine creatinine | mg/dL |
| 204 | `scr_value_day_of_ua_cr_hrs` | Serum Cr on day of urine Cr | mg/dL |
| 205 | `ua_urea_hrs` | Urine urea nitrogen available | yesno |
| 208 | `ua_urea_value_hrs` | Urine urea nitrogen | mg/dL |
| 210 | `fena_hrs` | FeNa (%) | calc |
| 211 | `feurea_hrs` | FEUrea (%) | calc |
| 215 | `ungal_value_hrs` | Urine NGAL | ng/mL |
| 216 | `ua_rbc_hrs` | Urine RBCs per HPF | number |
| 217 | `uaprotein_hrs` | Urine protein | mg |
| 218 | `ua_granularcasts_hrs` | Granular casts | yesno |
| 219 | `ua_epi_cells_hrs` | Tubular epithelial cells | yesno |

## Terlipressin Treatment Days 0--13 {#treatment-days}

Each treatment day (Day 0 through Day 13) contains identical fields. Variables are suffixed `_day0` through `_day13`. Below uses `N` as placeholder.

### Discontinuation & Adverse Events

| Variable Pattern | Label | Type | Values |
|:----------------|:------|:-----|:-------|
| `discont_terli_dayN` | Discontinued? | yesno | 1/0 |
| `discont_reason_terli_dayN` | Reason | radio | 1 = AE, 2 = HRS Reversal, 3 = Worsening/RRT, 4 = Death, 5 = Hospice, 6 = ICU decompensation, 7 = Respiratory failure, 8 = Ischemic event, 9 = Other |
| `terli_ae_abdpain_dayN` | Abdominal pain | yesno | |
| `terli_ae_nausea_dayN` | Nausea | yesno | |
| `terli_ae_diarrhea_dayN` | Diarrhea | yesno | |
| `terli_ae_volover_dayN` | Volume overload | yesno | |
| `terli_ae_brady_dayN` | Bradycardia | yesno | |
| `terli_other_dayN` | Other AE | text | |

### Dosing

| Variable Pattern | Label | Type |
|:----------------|:------|:-----|
| `terli_route_day0` | Route (Day 0 only) | radio: 1 = Bolus, 2 = Continuous |
| `dosechange_terli_dayN` | Dose adjusted? | yesno |
| `doseadjust_terli_dayN` | New dose | text (mg) |
| `total_terli_dayN` | Total terlipressin dose | text (mg) |

### Concomitant Medications

| Variable Pattern | Label | Unit |
|:----------------|:------|:-----|
| `albumin_terli_dayN` | Albumin use | yesno |
| `albumintotal_terli_dayN` | Albumin grams | g |
| `albuminvolume_terli_dayN` | Albumin volume | mL |
| `mido_terli_dayN` | Midodrine use | yesno |
| `mido_dose_terli_dayN` | Midodrine dose | mg |
| `octreo_terli_dayN` | Octreotide use | yesno |
| `octreo_dose_terli_dayN` | Octreotide dose | mcg |
| `norepi_terli_dayN` | Norepinephrine use | yesno |
| `norepi_dose_terli_dayN` | Norepinephrine dose | mcg |

### Vital Signs (per day, 4 time points)

| Variable Pattern | Label | Unit |
|:----------------|:------|:-----|
| `tele_terli_dayN` | Continuous telemetry | yesno |
| `temp_terli_dayN` | Temperature | celsius |
| `hr_terli_dayN` | Heart rate | BPM |
| `rr_terli_dayN` | Respiratory rate | -- |
| `spo2_terli_dayN` | SpO2 | % |
| `pao2_terli_dayN` | PaO2 | mmHg |
| `fio2_terli_dayN` | FiO2 | % |
| `sbp_terli_dayN_time{0-3}` | Systolic BP (0=midnight, 1=6AM, 2=noon, 3=6PM) | mmHg |
| `dbp_terli_dayN_time{0-3}` | Diastolic BP | mmHg |
| `map_terli_dayN_time{0-3}` | MAP | mmHg (calc) |
| `total_volume_in_terli_dayN` | Volume input | mL |
| `total_volume_out_terli_dayN` | Urine output/24h | mL |

### Daily Labs

| Variable Pattern | Label | Unit |
|:----------------|:------|:-----|
| `na_terli_dayN` | Serum sodium | mmol/L |
| `k_terli_dayN` | Serum potassium | mmol/L |
| `chloride_terli_dayN` | Chloride | mmol/L |
| `bicarb_terli_dayN` | Bicarbonate | mmol/L |
| `scr_terli_dayN` | Serum creatinine | mg/dL |
| `cystatinc_terli_dayN` | Cystatin C | mg/L |
| `bun_terli_dayN` | BUN | mg/dL |
| `ast_terli_dayN` | AST | U/L |
| `alt_terli_dayN` | ALT | U/L |
| `bili_terli_dayN` | Total bilirubin | mg/dL |
| `alb_terli_dayN` | Albumin | g/dL |
| `inr_terli_dayN` | INR | -- |
| `wbc_terli_dayN` | WBC | 10^9/L |
| `hgb_terli_dayN` | Hemoglobin | g/dL |
| `plt_terli_dayN` | Platelet count | 10^9/L |
| `he_terli_dayN` | HE grade | radio: 0--4 |

### Clinical Details

| Variable Pattern | Label | Type |
|:----------------|:------|:-----|
| `location_terli_day0` | Location (Day 0) | radio: 1 = General ward, 2 = Step-down, 3 = ICU |
| `diuretic_terli_dayN` | Diuretics used | yesno |
| `para_terli_dayN` | Paracentesis | yesno |
| `paravolume_terli_dayN` | Paracentesis volume | text (L) |
| `infection_terli_dayN` | Infection treatment | yesno |
| `typeinfection_terli_dayN` | Infection type | radio: 1 = Pneumonia, 2 = UTI, 3 = Bacteremia, 4 = SBP, 5 = Other |

## HRS-AKI Clinical Course {#hrs-clinical-course}

### Post-Discontinuation SCr

| Variable | Label | Unit |
|:---------|:------|:-----|
| `scr_day1_post_terli` -- `scr_day14_post_terli` | SCr 1--14 days after terli discontinuation | mg/dL |

### HRS Reversal & Recovery

| # | Variable | Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------|
| 1531 | `hrsreversal` | HRS reversal (SCr < 1.5) | yesno | 1/0 |
| 1534 | `hrsrecovery` | HRS response | radio | 0 = No response, 1 = Partial, 2 = Complete |
| 1537 | `recurrentaki` | Recurrent AKI after recovery | yesno | 1/0 |
| 1543 | `retreatment_terli` | Retreated with terlipressin | yesno | 1/0 |

### Nadir/Peak SCr

| # | Variable | Label | Unit |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|
| 1547 | `nadirhospit_scr` | Nadir SCr during hospitalization | mg/dL |
| 1550 | `peakhospit_scr` | Peak SCr during hospitalization | mg/dL |

### Renal Replacement Therapy

| # | Variable | Label | Type | Values |
|--:|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------|
| 1553 | `rrt` | RRT | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes, 2 = Need but not candidate |
| 1554 | `rrt_modality` | RRT modality | radio | 1 = Intermittent, 2 = Continuous |

## Hospitalization Course {#hospitalization}

| Variable | Label | Type | Values |
|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------|
| `lt_during_hospital` | LT during hospitalization | yesno | 1/0 |
| `slkt_during_hospital` | SLKT during hospitalization | yesno | 1/0 |
| `days_to_lt` | Days admission to LT | calc | |
| `hd_discharge` | HD at discharge | radio | |
| `disposition` | Discharge disposition | radio | 1 = Home, 2 = SNF, 3 = Rehab, 4 = Other, 5 = Death |
| `days_to_discharge` | Days admission to discharge | calc | |
| `lt_eval` | LT evaluation | radio | |
| `lteval_listingstatus` | LT listing status | radio | |

## Follow-Up {#followup}

| Variable | Label | Type | Values |
|:---------|:------|:-----|:-------|
| `dc_death_90days` | Death within 90 days | radio | 0 = No, 1 = Yes, 2 = Lost to follow-up |
| `dc_days_to_death` | Days discharge to death | number | |
| `dc_days_lastencounter` | Days discharge to last encounter | number | |
| `days_to_lost_to_followup` | Days to lost to follow-up | number | |
| `dc_lt_90days` | LT within 90 days | radio | 0 = No, 1 = LT, 2 = SLKT |
| `dc_hd_status` | HD status at follow-up | radio | |
| `dc_terli_use` | Terlipressin re-use | yesno | 1/0 |
| `dc_aki_recurrence` | AKI recurrence | yesno | 1/0 |
| `dc_scr30_value` | SCr at 30 days | text | mg/dL |
| `dc_scr60_value` | SCr at 60 days | text | mg/dL |
| `dc_scr90_value` | SCr at 90 days | text | mg/dL |
| `dc_albumin` | Albumin at follow-up | text | |
| `dc_inr` | INR at follow-up | text | |
| `dc_scr` | SCr at follow-up | text | |
| `dc_sna` | Sodium at follow-up | text | |
| `dc_tbili` | Bilirubin at follow-up | text | |
| `vital_status_1yr` | Vital status at 1 year | radio | |
| `hd_status_1yr` | HD at 1 year | radio | |
| `scr_value_1yr` | SCr at 1 year | text | |
| `lt_status_1yr` | LT status at 1 year | radio | |
| `lt_type_1yr` | LT type | radio | |
| `days_to_lt_1yr` | Days to LT | calc | |
| `tips_1yr` | TIPS at 1 year | radio | |
